reviews.review_description: Phenomenal. Profound. Truly a gift from the gods. Chef's kiss.
The other tarot apps suck. This one has so much going for it if they would work on it. I absolutely love that the reading is action based and just not back story of card meaning

I like the graphics for the tarot cards, how the characters actually pop up and talk to you. It’s pretty cool, but for the summary at the end the guy always says the same thing. This app has potential if the developers would actually work on it. It would be cool if there were multiple types of readings and maybe you could log readings.
